title: Nomad Brand Identity
description: A complete brand identity system for a modern nomadic lifestyle company.
longDescription: The Nomad project was a comprehensive rebrand that needed to capture the spirit of borderless living. Starting from a blank canvas, we developed a mark that evokes movement and horizon lines.

title: Flora E-commerce
description: A full e-commerce redesign for a premium botanical skincare brand.
longDescription: Flora Botanicals needed a digital storefront that felt as refined as their products. We redesigned the entire purchase journey, from discovery to checkout.

title: Solstice Summer Campaign
description: A bold summer campaign for an artisan beverage brand across digital and print.
longDescription: Solstice needed a campaign that could live across every format. We built a system around the concept of the golden hour: warmth, energy, and that feeling just before sunset.

title: Pulse Fitness App
description: A complete mobile app design for a next-generation fitness tracking platform.
longDescription: Pulse wanted to compete with established fitness apps by offering a more human, less clinical experience. We rethought the onboarding experience and made progress tracking feel rewarding.

title: Atlas Magazine Layout
description: A quarterly magazine redesign for a travel and culture publication.
longDescription: Atlas came to us with an aging magazine that needed to feel fresh without losing its authoritative voice. We introduced a new typographic hierarchy and redesigned the grid system.

title: Meridian Studio Website
description: An immersive portfolio website for a boutique architecture studio.
longDescription: Meridian builds spaces that challenge perception. Their website needed to do the same. We designed a scroll experience where each project reveals itself like a building being unveiled.
